core_mechanism: frequency-division multiplexing: partitioning a single broadband resource into orthogonal Fourier-frequency modes to synthesize N independent parallel channels, each formed by pairwise interference of two sideband modes
brief_reason: The abstract realizes N channels by accessing 2N modes at different Fourier frequencies of one broadband field and combining pairs of them by interference, which is decomposition of a single broadband carrier into independent orthogonal frequency-bin channels.
